entries.title: We visited influencer Jessica Reed Kraus’s mocktail night with her MAHA friends to talk about voting, policy and RFK Jr.’s tenure

Republican Clayton Fuller won the special election for Georgia’s 14th Congressional District, formerly held by Marjorie Taylor Greene

Retired Army Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman is a Democrat running for Senate in solidly Republican Florida

President Trump’s repeated declarations that the Iran war is nearly over are colliding with the gritty battlefield reality, some U.S. officials and analysts say
